name: Chicken Ya-hah!
recipeIngredient: 2 Chicken breasts, split, skinned and boned
8 tsp Water chestnuts, sliced (canned as a last resort)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the celery, onions, and garlic in oil until the onions are translucent.
2. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and add it to the pan with the celery mixture.
3. Add the celery seed, jalapenos, and water chestnuts.
4. Cook until the chicken is barely done.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients: chili powder, cumin, oregano, red wine, garlic, tomato sauce, and curry powder.
6. Cover and simmer for an hour.
7. Serve over cornbread, rice, or pasta. Enjoy!
